{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20744_1
|class_id=20744
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=collection@20744_2
|fame=14
|art=15
|fth=30
|civ=16
|tech=15
|ss1=Per 20 Chores completed, Snail ATK +3<br>Chores Completed: 300/300
|ss2=Per 20 Chores completed, Snail ATK +6<br>Chores Completed: 300/300
|ss3=Per 20 Chores completed, Snail ATK +9<br>Chores Completed: 300/300
|ss4=Per 20 Chores completed, Snail ATK +9<br>Chores Completed: 300/300
|ss7=Per 20 Chores completed, Snail ATK +9<br>Chores Completed: 300/300<br> (Awakened)
}}
